I can't be the only one.

Tap out, Dan. I love ya but I don't believe in sparing the rod.


Dan Dakich (@dandakich)

Hahahahahahahahahahahaaaaa..." a mental burden"
-you dudes are funny...always hitting on the easiest....it's a tradition unlike any other...
Guaranteed the way Bruce and I "watch the MAC" ain't how you and the kids covering college hoops "watch the MAC"

posts.text:
Stop it, Dan (and you, too, Coach Pearl for retweeting). There's a mental burden to being undefeated for that long. Akron is the best team. UMass has an excellent coach and solid MAC roster. UMASS is better than its record. Do y'all watch the MAC?


Dan Dakich (@dandakich)

Hahaha.. the old easy media narrative “ran out of gas”.. not even a bit of a factor ..
Total Nonsense…
As I said absolutely no surprise a coach @coachbrucepearl nailed it and the woke college hoops media got it twisted!!!!

Everybody knew Akron was the best team. They're 40-2 in their last 42 conference games. Lost a squeaker to Miami earlier this year. Vegas odds favored Akron winning the tourney. Miami ran out of gas getting everyone's best shot. It was only a matter of time before they loss.
